fields.label: Source Key / Column
fields.description: Column header (Excel/CSV) or JSON key returned by extraction.

fields.label: Target Field
fields.description: Fieldname on the target DocType (e.g. supplier, posting_date, qty).

fields.label: Scope
fields.description: header = one value for the whole document; row = a line item.
